summary: Tested Access Control Page with granular hierarchical permissions feature. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. All permission CRUD operations work correctly. Frontend: Page renders correctly with collapsible modules, role selector, permission buttons (None/View/Edit/Full), module toggles, Save Changes, and Reset to Default buttons all functional. Save flow successfully persists permissions to backend. One critical issue found: Frontend ROLES list contains roles (marketing, operations, academic_master, quality_control) that don't exist in backend DEFAULT_SYSTEM_ROLES, causing 'Role not found' error when saving.

ui_bugs.issue: React warning: Collapsible is changing from uncontrolled to controlled. Should initialize expandedModules state with all module IDs set to false instead of empty object.

integration_issues.flow: Role permissions save for non-system roles
integration_issues.issue: Frontend ROLES array (line 27-41 AccessControlPage.jsx) includes 'marketing', 'operations', 'academic_master', 'quality_control' but backend DEFAULT_SYSTEM_ROLES doesn't include these. Saving permissions for these roles fails with 'Role not found' 404 error.

passed_tests: Backend: Super admin login successful
Backend: GET /api/user/permissions returns full access for super admin
Backend: GET /api/roles/{role_id}/permissions returns saved permissions or empty dict
Backend: GET /api/roles/{role_id}/permissions works for all system roles (admin, sales_manager, team_leader, etc.)
Backend: PUT /api/roles/{role_id}/permissions saves permissions correctly
Backend: Finance module with 15 sub-pages saved and verified
Backend: Settings module permissions saved for admin
Backend: All permission levels (none/view/edit/full) accepted
Backend: Module enable/disable state preserved
Backend: Permissions can be reset/cleared
Backend: Unknown role handled correctly
Backend: User permissions endpoint returns correct structure
Backend: All system roles (15) are accessible
Backend: Complete permission structure with 8 modules saved
Frontend: Access Control page loads correctly
Frontend: Role selector dropdown opens and changes role
Frontend: Expand All/Collapse All buttons work
Frontend: Module cards show with enable/disable toggle
Frontend: Sub-page permission buttons (None/View/Edit/Full) clickable
Frontend: Save Changes button enabled after changes
Frontend: Save Changes saves to backend with success toast
Frontend: Permissions persist after role switch and return
Frontend: Reset to Default button works
action_items: CRITICAL: Add missing roles to backend DEFAULT_SYSTEM_ROLES (server.py line 4655): 'marketing', 'operations', 'academic_master', 'quality_control' OR remove them from frontend ROLES array (AccessControlPage.jsx line 27-41)
LOW: Fix React uncontrolled to controlled warning in AccessControlPage.jsx by initializing expandedModules with all module IDs set to false
critical_code_review_comments: Role mismatch between frontend ROLES array and backend DEFAULT_SYSTEM_ROLES causes 404 error when saving permissions for marketing, operations, academic_master, quality_control roles
React warning about Collapsible controlled state - minor UX issue but should be fixed

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All features work except saving for 4 non-system roles)

seed_data_creation: Created test permissions for roles: sales_executive, finance, admin, team_leader, cs_agent, mentor, hr during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Access Control page with granular permissions is fully functional. Backend endpoints work correctly for all system roles. Frontend UI works well with collapsible modules, role selector, permission buttons, and save/reset functionality. MAIN ISSUE: 4 roles in frontend (marketing, operations, academic_master, quality_control) don't exist in backend DEFAULT_SYSTEM_ROLES - saving for these will fail. React Collapsible warning is minor and cosmetic.
